name: Patient Case
history: Recent divorce. Financial struggles and adjustment to single life. Co-parenting. Multiple friendships deteriorated after the divorce. Complicated relationship with parents.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: I must handle everything on my own or I will fail.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am not capable of managing my life successfully.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of financial responsibilities, withdrawal from social interactions.
situation: Managing financial hardship following the divorce, including handling financial paperwork.
auto_thought: I can't manage this on my own.
behavior: Procrastination in dealing with financial matters, isolation from friends and family.
